facts.title: Support language
facts.body: All user-facing community and DM replies must be written in English.

facts.title: Writing style
facts.body: Do not use the em dash character. Use commas, parentheses, or a regular hyphen instead.

facts.title: War Room hours
facts.body: The War Room is open Monday through Friday from 11:15 AM to 7:00 PM ARG. It is closed Saturdays and Sundays.

facts.title: War Room breakout room
facts.body: Once users enter the War Room, they must join the breakout room called Stargazer - Team.

facts.title: Step 0 Cursor access
facts.body: Contributors who passed the courses and are now EQ or see the project as ineligible should come to the War Room to request Cursor access. This is step 0 of the project guideline.

facts.title: Model changes
facts.body: The Qwen model is deprecated now; the contributors must make Sonnet 4.6 fail.

facts.title: Step 0 after Cursor access
facts.body: If a contributor has already completed the courses and received an invitation to enroll, they should go to the war room to request that their account be unlocked.

facts.title: Recommend work in war room
facts.body: Always RECOMMEND entering the war room while working, in order to achieve better results

facts.title: Throttle
facts.body: The 1-task/24hr throttle is automatic and applies with no exceptions until ~3 tasks are completed, at which point quality metrics are evaluated to decide whether to enable more volume. No individual task score or user request removes it early.

facts.title: Manager answer style
facts.body: Mirror the manager style: direct, concise, supportive, and operational. Prefer 1-3 short sentences, say exactly what action the contributor should take, and avoid generic apologies or long explanations.

facts.title: Manager language pattern
facts.body: The manager answers contributors in English. Keep all automatic community and DM replies in English even when the incoming message is Spanish or Portuguese.

facts.title: No assistant footer
facts.body: Do not add a signature, footer, attribution, or assistant name to automated replies.

facts.title: War Room support pattern
facts.body: When live support is relevant and it is a weekday after 11:15 AM ARG, tell contributors to join the War Room and then join the breakout room called Stargazer - Team. On weekends, say the War Room is closed and ask them to come back Monday between 11:15 AM and 7:00 PM ARG.

facts.title: Escalate uncertain cases
facts.body: If the message asks about account policy, eligibility decisions, payment, deadlines, personal status, or anything not supported by guidelines or memory, route to a human instead of guessing.

facts.title: Cursor access support flow
facts.body: For contributors who completed courses but are EQ, ineligible, locked, or missing Cursor access, the expected step is to enter the War Room and ask the team to check or unlock access. This is Step 0.

facts.title: Current model setup
facts.body: The project moved away from Qwen. Contributors should use Claude Sonnet 4.6 for Stargazer tasks and make sure their Cursor configuration follows the current project guidelines.

facts.title: Initial task throttle
facts.body: The 1-task-per-24-hours throttle is automatic at the beginning and should not be promised as manually removable. The team evaluates quality after contributors complete enough tasks.
